name: obsidian-word-history
description: Generate a Star History-style word-count SVG from a Git-backed Obsidian vault.

scripts.package: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./manifest.json').version") && npm run build && rm -rf dist/word-history && mkdir -p dist/word-history && cp main.js manifest.json versions.json dist/word-history/ && rm -f "dist/word-history-v$VERSION.zip" && cd dist && zip -qr "word-history-v$VERSION.zip" word-history

author: Timisic
